summary:
Implemented the next Anton task: a high-value fuse search UX pass that avoids changing fuse facts.

Changed:
- Added static layman search shortcuts in [search-data.js](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/search-data.js:135) for:
  - `power outlet`
  - `trailer brake lights`
  - `radio`
  - `backup camera`
- Extended search synonyms in [shared-ui.js](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/shared-ui.js:3702).
- Added browser-smoke assertions for those aliases in [Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/tools/audit/Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1:187).
- Bumped offline cache to `ridgeline-console-v245` in [service-worker.js](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/service-worker.js:1).
- Updated [AGENT_STATE.md](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/AGENT_STATE.md:15), [AGENT_BACKLOG.md](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/AGENT_BACKLOG.md:19), [SITE_QUALITY_AUDIT.md](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/SITE_QUALITY_AUDIT.md:22), and [ANTON.md](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/ANTON.md:124).

Verified:
- `Test-InternalLinks.ps1` passed for 16 HTML files.
- Playwright/Chrome verified all four new search aliases surface the intended results.
- Captured screenshots under `debug-screenshots/audit-v245-*.png`, including `audit-v245-mobile-search-power-outlet.png`.

Note: `Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1` could not complete because Chromium `--dump-dom` returned an empty DOM with both Edge and Chrome in this shell. I recorded the Playwright fallback in the state files.

Research sources recorded in the backlog:
- https://fuse-box.info/honda/honda-ridgeline-2017-2019-fuses
- https://techinfo.honda.com/rjanisis/pubs/QS/AH/AT6Z1717OG/enu/AT6Z1717OG.pdf
